title: Makefile recipes indented with spaces instead of tabs
makefile_snippet:
test: ## Run tests
    go test -race ./...

build-api: ## Build API binary
    go build -o bin/api ./cmd/api
context: Recipe lines use 4 spaces for indentation instead of a hard tab character. Make will refuse to parse these targets and emit 'missing separator' errors.
expected_feedback: Makefile recipes must use hard tab characters, not spaces; space-indented recipes cause 'missing separator' parse errors
